name: Euphoria City - Magical Girls vs Villainesses RPG
description:
You're a resident of Euphoria City, a bustling metropolis where technology, magic, and superpowers have become intertwined. In this city, an event known as The Aura Phenomenon occurred, mysteriously granting an extremely small population of women Auras. These Auras boost certain attributes to superhuman levels akin to super powers. Those that fight for good are known as Magical Girls, while those that use their Auras selfishly for dominance are known as Villainesses. Euphoria City has since become a battleground for Villains manipulating and controlling others, while groups of Magical Girls battle against them.

Despite the small percentage of females with Auras, you are the most rare anomaly of all. You're the only man that has an Aura. Given the circumstances, your Aura seems to draw the attention of both the city's heroines and villainesses, making you a target for those who seek to exploit your unique abilities or shun you for your differences...

The choices and path you take are completely up to you. Will you become the true hero of Euphoria City? Will you join a villainess or date a Magical Girl(s)? Maybe your desires are to claim the city as your own, becoming the supervillain and conqueror of Euphoria City, smiting any and all that refuse to bend to your will. A henchwoman or army of henchwomen might be nice too! Or maybe you just want to stay out of it all... This is your journey and you decide your goals and purpose!

Note: In the opener, you're provided a few locations to choose to visit. You're not limited to them, so feel free to do whatever you want!

(The reference picture was AI generated by me using Flux.)

IMPORTANT: User Persona Template (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome and suave X'X" male with an Aura. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short X hair and X eyes. {{user}} excels at close quarters combat, and has a notable amount of willpower. {{user}} has the Aura of superhuman strength and durability. {{user}} wears a gunmetal full body spandex bodysuit with black boots and gloves as a costume. {{user}} is the only man with an Aura.

Please consider creating or using a Persona while playing this if the RP is acting weird towards your character. If you don't have an Aura detailed or don't mention it at the very least, the bot will start making stuff up for you.

Tags: Superhero, Superheroes, Hero, Heroes, Villain, Heroine, Villainess, Superheroine, Superheroines, Henchwoman, Henchwomen, Magic, Magical, Powers, Powerplay, Power Exchange, Costume, Uniform, Outfit, Spandex, Latex, Leather, Gadgets, Toys, Traps, Peril, Bondage, Breathplay, Wrestling, Grappling, Femdom, Maledom, Multiple, Transformation, Corruption, Hypnosis, Mind Control, Mesmerized, Mesmerizing, Seduction, Temptation, Tease, Denial, Edging, BDSM, CFNM, CYOA, Bad End, Good End, Switch, Cartoon/Comic Violence, 18+

(Tag notes: kinks and fetishes are largely dependent on how you play. Tags may vary based on your experiences and the characters randomly generated.)

Dev Rambles:

I'm pleased to announce this open world (technically open city) superhero RPG scenario. I'm a sucker for superhero, comic, and anime universes with this type of setting. Ever since AI chatbots started to become popular, I tried making superhero or supervillain worlds, but they would tend to get reduced into a single character. Earlier LLM models just couldn't really handle the openness of an super adventure and world for long without breaking.

That being said, I created this entire bot locally since Janitor's LLM has been INCREDIBLY slow for me lately. Worse, when I ported the bot here to JAI, it was nearly unplayable. Sadly, getting this bot to be even remotely close to the experiences I was having locally when playing required me to basically create a new bot altogether. But I didn't half ass this for JAI because this site is SEVERELY lacking good open world adventures within this genre. I'm not really into the sc
creator: PlayerWon
